arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Legia Warsaw Conference League quarter-final clash predicted
arts.sum: Chelsea enter the second leg of their Conference League quarter-final clash against Legia Warsaw with a healthy three-goal lead, and barring an incredible comeback from the Polish side, the Blues have all but confirmed their spot in the semi-finals of the competition. A win, draw, or defeat by two goals or less will confirm Chelsea's spot in the Conference League semi-finals, where the Blues will face either Austrian side Rapid Vienna or Swedish side Djurgarden.
